title: Ecommerce 3D
description: E-commerce platform for selling custom 3D products and ready-to-ship items.
fullDescription: Ecommerce 3D is an e-commerce platform designed to offer both customizable 3D products and ready-to-ship items. The system allows users to request personalized products in 3D, as well as browse a traditional catalog of products available for immediate delivery. The application was built with a focus on user experience, performance, and scalability, integrating a robust backend using NestJS with Node.js, a dynamic frontend built with React, and a PostgreSQL database for efficient data management. The platform includes features such as user authentication, shopping cart, order management and an administrative panel for inventory and sales control.
roleDescription: Worked as a Full Stack Developer, responsible for end-to-end application development, including frontend, backend, and database integration.
responsibilities: Developed RESTful APIs using NestJS and Node.js
Designed and managed data models with PostgreSQL
Developed shopping cart and checkout flow
Created an administrative panel for product and order management
Developed order tracking screens and workflows for both users and administrators
